hero.title: Elevated Plant-Based Catering
hero.subtitle: Discover a sustainable and exquisite culinary experience.

menu.title: Our Dishes
menu.subtitle: Culinary creations that celebrate the richness of plant ingredients

ceviche.name: Ceviche Catering
ceviche.description: Fresh ceviche made with selected plant-based ingredients, marinated in lime juice and exotic spices.

cheese.name: Artisanal Cheeses
cheese.description: Selection of artisanal vegan cheeses made from nuts and natural cultures, aged to perfection.

main.name: Main Course Plate
main.description: Elaborate selection of seasonal main courses with premium plant proteins and signature sauces.

salad.name: Seasonal Salads
salad.description: Fresh compositions of organic vegetables, seeds and artisanal dressings that delight the palate.

tart.name: Savory Tarts
tart.description: Gourmet tarts with crispy bases filled with seasonal vegetables and smooth vegetable creams.

appetizer.name: Creative Appetizers
appetizer.description: Unique and elegant bites that open the appetite and surprise with unexpected flavor combinations.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Unique gastronomic experiences for every occasion

corporate.name: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Professional catering for meetings, conferences and corporate celebrations. Impress your clients with a top-tier gastronomic proposal.

weddings.name: Weddings & Celebrations
weddings.description: Turn the most special day into an unforgettable culinary experience. Personalized menus that tell your story.

private.name: Private Experiences
private.description: Private chef at home for intimate dinners and exclusive events. A completely personalized gastronomic experience.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Where sustainability becomes culinary art
about.story: Uchuvva was born from the conviction that plant-based cooking can be as exquisite as any haute cuisine. Our team of specialized chefs transforms top-quality plant ingredients into memorable gastronomic experiences.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Local and seasonal ingredients, biodegradable packaging and a total commitment to the planet.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Each dish is a work of art crafted with haute cuisine techniques and selected products.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously explore new combinations and techniques to surprise and delight.

contact.title: Request a Quote
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will prepare a personalized proposal
